Milo differential abundance wrapper

Source: R/RunProportionTest.R
RunProportionTestMilo.Rd

Method-specific Milo wrapper used by RunProportionTest. Stores both group-level and neighborhood-level result lists. When miloR is available, graph-ready neighborhood node/edge data are also stored under details$milo_graph_data for visualization.

Usage

RunProportionTestMilo(
  srt,
  group.by,
  split.by,
  sample.by,
  comparison = NULL,
  milo_k = 20L,
  milo_d = 30L,
  n_bootstrap = 500,
  seed = 11,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

srt

A Seurat object.

group.by

Cell-type metadata column.

split.by

Condition metadata column.

sample.by

Sample metadata column.

comparison

Optional comparisons to perform.

milo_k

k used for Milo graph building.

milo_d

Number of dimensions used by Milo.

n_bootstrap

Bootstrap iterations for summary/fallback.

seed

Random seed.

verbose

Whether to print messages.

See also

RunProportionTest
